items.title: My immediate thoughts, which are mostly based on emotion:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
My immediate thoughts, which are mostly based on emotion:

I'm sad to see Jaylen Brown go. He was our guy for a decade and we watched him grow up in the NBA. He was never a perfect player, but he became an awesome one. He'll be missed greatly in the Boston community too.

1/2

He has a $1.8 million trade bonus that will be divided over the next three years.

He will be extension-eligible during the offseason for up to two additional years.

items.title: The Celtics save about $2.9M this season by trading Jaylen Brown for Paul George.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Celtics save about $2.9M this season by trading Jaylen Brown for Paul George.

Brown's remaining contract:
26-27: $57.1M
27-28: $61.0M
28-29: $64.9M

George's remaining contract:
26-27: $54.1M
27-28: $56.6M (player option)

items.title: The Celtics appear to have gotten less for Jaylen Brown than the Clippers got for Kawhi Leonard. It's hard to accentuate how crazy that is. We'll see what comes next, but that is a paltry return for a player of Brown's talent, age, health and contractual status.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt: The Celtics appear to have gotten less for Jaylen Brown than the Clippers got for Kawhi Leonard. It's hard to accentuate how crazy that is. We'll see what comes next, but that is a paltry return for a player of Brown's talent, age, health and contractual status.

items.title: It's a massively underwhelming return.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
It's a massively underwhelming return.

Hard not to look at this trade and think the Celtics should have been more aggressive about closing a deal for Giannis.

Until now, at least possible they could have brought Jaylen Brown back despite all that's transpired. Now, it's hard not to regret that.

The Sixers other picks are tied up with protections and swaps.

Philadelphia has a whole bunch of second-round picks that they can send to Boston.
